Ibrahimovic recounts his transfer to PSG in 2012 in his autobiography:

“Galliani told me ‘Don’t worry Zlatan, we won’t sell you’. Few weeks later I was in my home in Vacholm, I was returning from a trip when I had five missed calls from Raiola.

Mino said ‘Leonardo will speak to you’, then I realized it’s Leonardo the sporting director of PSG. I then told Mino ‘Listen, I will not answer this call. Galliani confirmed to me they will not sell me’. Then Mino simply told me ‘I know, but they’ve already sold you’.

I told Raiola to make things difficult for PSG. I asked to maintain my salary at Milan. I thought they’ll say ‘Man you exaggerate, you ask for too much’. I told my wife Helena they would never accept that, it was impossible.

But only 20 minutes later, Mino called me and said ‘You’ll have everything you asked for’. After that, there was no turning back so I told him ‘Ok, get everything ready’. I am a man of my word and when I say anything I do it.”
